title: Your Certs Are Expiring: Digital Certificate Management Explained
summary: Jeff Crume explains digital certificates and the risks of expiration. The video argues that shorter certificate lifetimes increase operational risk, and positions certificate lifecycle management as a critical emerging cybersecurity discipline.
